subject: Math
domain: Number and Operations in Base Ten

lesson.objective: Fluently multiply and divide multi-digit whole numbers.
lesson.concept_explanation: Multi-Digit Whole Number Operations uses models to connect numbers, operations, and meanings before calculating. Careful labels help you choose the right operation and avoid common errors.
lesson.common_misconception: A common mistake is misaligning digits by place value. Slow down and match each step to the model.
lesson.real_world_connection: Engineers, scientists, game designers, and community planners use these Grade Five math strategies to make accurate decisions.
lesson.lesson_summary: Use the model, write the math clearly, and check that the answer fits the question for Multi-Digit Whole Number Operations.

hints: Read the question and name the model first.
Underline the numbers and operation words.
Check your answer against the visual model.

feedback.correct: Correct. Your reasoning matches the model.
feedback.incorrect: Try again. Rebuild the model and check each place or step.

algorithm_steps: Multiply 27 by each place-value part of 13.
Add the partial products.

misconception_bank.partial_products_confusion: forgetting one or more partial products.
misconception_bank.quotient_place_value_error: placing quotient digits in the wrong place.
misconception_bank.remainder_interpretation_error: not interpreting the remainder in context.

game_theme.title: Multi-Digit Whole Number Operations
game_theme.mission_intro: Join the Skill World crew to master multi-digit whole number operations through models, narration, and practice levels.

story.text: Welcome to the Multi-Digit Whole Number Operations mission. Today you will use models and careful math language to solve fluently multiply and divide multi-digit whole numbers. Read the story, notice what each visual is showing, and press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This lesson teaches the important ideas for Multi-Digit Whole Number Operations. Look for place value, operation order, and labels before you calculate. Press Next after you can explain the model in your own words.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: Watch the tutor solve one example. First read the question, then connect each number to the visual model, and finally check whether the answer makes sense. Press Next when you are ready to try a guided demo.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: In the demo, build the solution one step at a time. Say what the model shows, use precise Grade Five math words, and compare your thinking with the explanation. Press Next to move into independent practice.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: Practice is your first independent try. Use the visual model before answering, then tap Read Question if you want the problem read aloud. Choose or type your answer, and press Next after you check your feedback.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: The challenge asks you to transfer the same skill to a harder problem. Slow down, use Read Question if helpful, and explain the operation or coordinate step before you answer. Press Next after you learn from the feedback.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: The checkpoint shows what you can do on your own. Read the page, tap Read Question for the problem, and solve using the model rather than guessing. Your answer helps build your growth profile.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: You reached the badge screen for Multi-Digit Whole Number Operations. Celebrate the strategies you practiced, name one misconception you avoided, and get ready to save your progress. Press Save Growth Data when you are ready.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page summarizes your growth for Multi-Digit Whole Number Operations. Review your stars, notice any misconception tags, and continue to Skill Practice Center for focused levels. Use the practice route when you want more questions.
profile.label: Read This Page
